scenarios.description: Hexadecimal literal '0x1F' is parsed as NUMBER_LITERAL
scenarios.precondition: default config disallowing arrays and structures, real OperatorDictionary allowing only '*'
pseudocode: ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(EMPTY_OP_DICT, EMPTY_FN_DICT, false, false, false);

scenarios.description: Prefix operator '-' at start is parsed then NUMBER_LITERAL
scenarios.precondition: config with custom prefix '-' operator in real OperatorDictionary
pseudocode: OperatorDictionaryIfc opDict = new OperatorDictionary(); opDict.addPrefixOperator("-", mock(OperatorIfc.class));
ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(opDict, EMPTY_FN_DICT, false, false, false);

scenarios.description: Postfix operator '!' after number is parsed as POSTFIX_OPERATOR
scenarios.precondition: config with custom postfix '!' operator in real OperatorDictionary
pseudocode: OperatorDictionaryIfc opDict = new OperatorDictionary(); opDict.addPostfixOperator("!", mock(OperatorIfc.class));
ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(opDict, EMPTY_FN_DICT, false, false, false);

scenarios.description: Decimal literal with leading dot '.5' parsed as NUMBER_LITERAL
pseudocode: ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(EMPTY_OP_DICT, EMPTY_FN_DICT, false, false, false);

scenarios.description: Valid structure separator between variables produces VARIABLE, STRUCTURE_SEPARATOR, VARIABLE
scenarios.precondition: config allowing structures, disabling arrays and implicit multiplication
pseudocode: ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(EMPTY_OP_DICT, EMPTY_FN_DICT, false, false, true);

scenarios.description: Implicit multiplication between two grouped expressions (BRACE_CLOSEâ†’BRACE_OPEN) when allowed
scenarios.precondition: config allowing implicit multiplication, real OperatorDictionary for '*'
pseudocode: OperatorDictionaryIfc opDict = new OperatorDictionary(); opDict.addInfixOperator("*", mock(OperatorIfc.class));
ExpressionConfiguration cfg = new ExpressionConfiguration(opDict, EMPTY_FN_DICT, true, false, false);
